highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur):

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Which Nursing job profile is highly paid?
faqs.answer:
Highest Nursing job is Senior Staff Nurse.
They manage junior staff nurses and Nursing students to make sure patients get best care. 
These nurses are give nursing care to such patients.

faqs.question: Is Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) is a well-known institution for MD, MS, ANM, GNM, MBBS, B.Sc. courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) has a rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.7 on campuslife, 4.3 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Does Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) has been rated 4.3 on placements.

A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) is up to 267. Good thing to know is that Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC, INC.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the degree, as we will get a government job after completing MBBS.

review_content.Placements: Placements as a junior president or a Job for MBBS in a different hospital. Many students, after completing MBBS they either start preparing for NEET, PG or start doing Jobs in different hospitals, such as AIIMS, or start working in their own clinics. The top roles offered are JR, whose salary is almost 90000 after completing MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good, that is average, not up to the mark. Hospital has very good patient flow, increasing day by day, with 1200 beds. Hostel is good. Both girls and boys have different hostels. There is a different college block where the lecture is held, and the mess is good in comparison to other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good academics but 0 campus life but students still make the college life fun.

review_content.Placements: Unlike engineering colleges, companies don't come to hire us. We have 1.5 years of paid internships in our hospital. After which it's our decision if we want to continue working in the same hospital, go for PG, or join some other hospital. A lot of students do PG from here, but personally, I wouldn't recommend it because of the sufficient patient flow.
review_content.Infrastructure: Average would be a good word; if I am being completely honest, our hostel cupboards have fungus issues, and college infrastructure is okay, not bad. But not too good, not enough lecture halls, and some benches are broken. We are taught on projectors in class, which are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is around 100 percent.

review_content.Placements: The MBBS course is very good here. Maximum students get placement, and academically, everything is good; we don’t have to face any problems in college. The average package is around 10-15 lakhs annually. It's a very reputed college. Top roles offered by the college are related to the medical field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and the infrastructure of the college is pretty well maintained. They have a good campus life here, but fests don’t occur a lot on campus; this is a drawback related to this. Otherwise, events occur on campus, such as cultural events and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with this college, .

review_content.Placements: I got admission in Saraswathi institute of medical Science, Hapur in 2023. My batch is of 250 students. I got admission in private MBBS. I got my degree in my hsnd in 2028, including internship. Saraswathi institute of medical Science, Hapur is good in terms of internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: 2 seater or 3 seater rooms are allotted by the college. We got lecture in college block. There is a library in college which opens from 9 am to 10 pm. Labs are properly managed with proper instruments required. Wi-Fi is installed in every hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Average infrastructure but good faculty for study and passing examinations.

review_content.Placements: The internship rotation is normal at the college. A normal OPD is here which is not too busy. Many students easily qualify for the NEET exam and also get a good seat in a government college. Many students also apply for junior resident jobs easily after studying at the institute.
review_content.Infrastructure: A separate hostel is available for boys and girls. First-year students are taken to a separate hostel for ragging-related issues. Air-conditioned rooms are also available, which are charged an extra INR 1 lac from the hostel fee. PG hostels are also separate from normal hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with the college services and infrastructure and have good teachers.

review_content.Placements: MBBS course colleges do not get college placements. You have to separately go to the hospital and get your placement. Interviews are held. Placements are done according to your skills and marks in college. Our college itself has some placement seats that can be taken. It has many PG seats too. It provides stipends according to your department and has a good team of doctors. You have to work on HR skills during your course. You can apply for good hospitals. You can work in AIIMS or good hospitals and can be paid handsomely. It just depends on your skills and marks.

paragraphs:
Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theSaraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur)application form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) courses, students can visit the website.

Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) admission:

description: Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 10

As per the Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) MBBS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 100811 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 96644 in 2023 and 224781 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, MBBS saw inconsistency in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur).

The Saraswathi Institute of Medical Sciences (SIMS Hapur) cutoff 2025 has been released for MBBS admissions across various categories belonging to the HS quota. Considering the UP NEET UG Round 4 cutoff 2025, admission for the General HS category for MBBS was closed at a rank of 45885.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college services and infrastructure and have good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not perfect but good enough for normal days. There is no clogging of water on roads. Transport facilities are allowed for students. The condition of the roads is normal. Newly made sewage system. Parking facilities are not good. Security services are good. The main door closes at night. Good food service in 2 cafeterias. Good street food is served. Market is around 5-10 km from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and education here are of the highest quality.
reviews.review_text: The lecture theatres are well-equipped with smartboards and whiteboards, air conditioners, and proper lighting. The library is allowed after a few months since you started the first year. The quality of food in the mess is excellent. We have a laundry system and workers for cleaning rooms. Proper instruments like cadavers, sphygmomanometers, and ECG machines are provided.

college_info.college_name: Government College of Pharmacy, Karad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government College of Pharmacy, Karad:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government College of Pharmacy, Karad offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a beautiful campus with excellent teachers and a reputed superspeciality block.

content.Placements: In India, approximately 15000000 students write NEET exam but only 1 to 2% of students are able to get MBBS seats in India. The highest salary package is up to 12 LPA, while the average is 7 LPA to 8 LPA. In 5th year of MBBS, all students do internships in their own colleges or private hospitals. MBBS doctors can teach at online platforms, open their own clinics, or work as junior doctors.
content.Infrastructure: Several practicals are conducted in different labs. Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious. They have projectors and digital modes. An air-conditioned library is present. Hostels are quite spacious, with almirahs, beds, and tables. The food quality varies from mess to mess. The taste of the food is average. Outdoor and indoor grounds are present. Our college gates are always open for any medical emergency for patients.

It is also beneficial for financial support who belong to the weaker section.

content.Placements: As I have mentioned that this is a medical college so no placements are provided by the college. However internship is compulsory for the students after completing 4.5 years out of the 5.5 years MBBS course. And stipend which is given during this internship varies across the country and depend on the state government. In Uttar Pradesh the stipend given is from 12000 to 15000 rupees per month.

There is a library in the college where you can go and study at late nights.

description: Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 10664 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 10664 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11299 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD, MS and PG Diploma. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 13395 to 49102. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in General Surgery. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 13395.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing rank was 3148 wherein M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.
In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 3148 for M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical College cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 11919 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 14391 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at SRM Ramapuram?

faqs.answer: A:    During SRM Ramapuram placements 2023, more than 140 companies made offers so far and made over 12,000 total offers to the students out of which over 1300 offers were made so far in campus recruitment process. faqs.question: Is SRM Ramapuram good for placement?

faqs.answer: A:    BTech is one of the most popular programme in SRM Ramapuram. The placements of BTech at SRM Ramapuram is good. Multiple internships & placement opportunities are offered to the students. Top recruiting companies like Adobe, Walmart, etc. come to hire students.
faqs.question: How are BTech placements at SRM Ramapuram?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, SRM Ramapuram accept the JEE Mains score. Candidates who have not given the entrance exams conducted by the university such as SRMJEEE (UG), SRMJEEE (PG) and can get admission through the JEE Main score, Moreover, apart from entrance exams, candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admissions. Further, the final admission process include seat allotment through an e-Counselling process.
faqs.question: Does SRM Ramapuram accept the JEE Mains score?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Ramapuram follows a rigorous selection process for the allocation of MBA seats. Students who satisfy the eligibility criteria are further screened based on their academic performance, entrance test scores, and work experience (if any). Further, these students are also required to participate in the GD round. Those who qualify the GD round are evaluated via a Personal Interview round. Finally, those who qualify the PI are allocated an MBA seat.
faqs.question: On what basis are SRM Ramapuram MBA seats allocated?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes,  SRM Ramapuram accepts TANCET scores for admission to its M.Tech courses. The Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test, abbreviated as TANCET, is an admission test conducted by Anna University to fill PG seats. As per sources across the web, the exam for the 2025 session is expected to be held in the second week of March 2025.Apart from this, the university also accepts GATE scores. Moreover, students who have not appeared for any of the aforementioned exams can take the SRMJEE PG conducted by the university itself.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of SRM for BTech?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM B.Tech fee ranges between INR 5 Lacs & INR 18 Lacs as per an official source. B.Tech fee includes the integrated M.Tech fee as well. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also be required to pay a registration fee to apply for admission.

overview_faqs.question: What documents are required for the refund process at SRM Ramapuram?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee refund process at SRM Ramapuram only begins upon receipt of the original documents by the Director of Admissions, Amaravati, either by courier or in person. Following is the list of the required documents:All receipts for fee paymentsCounselling call letterProvisional allotment letter (PAL)Cancelled cheque from the bank for money refund.Note: If all documents submitted for refund are in order, then the time taken to process and effect the transfer of refund money will be 30 working days.

overview_faqs.question: Does SRM Ramapuram have any fee refund policy?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM Ramapuram fee refund policy is based on UGC guidelines. Candidates get full refund at any time between the academic year of admission. To get the refund, candidates are required to bring an application form signed by the student and their parent and can be submitted in person or online. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form. The refund will be processed by RTGS or NEFT.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA programme at SRM Ramapuram?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee to pursue MBA from SRM Ramapuram is INR 2.25 lakh. Other than this, the fee structure includes other charges such as admission fees, hostel fees, development & training fees, etc. Candidates who wish to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, neat, and clean. There is no objection to joining the SRM campus.

content.Placements: CSE has a great value in placement. Students who score above 8.5 percent will go for placements. The highest salary package offered is 70 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 40 LPA. Companies like Amazon, TCS, and Infosys hire students. Internships are based on our skills. content.Placements: Placements for B. Tech IT at SRM RMP are around 60–75 percent. Almost everyone manages to secure placements. Most recruiting companies are mass recruitment and service-based firms. The average salary is around 4–5 LPA, the lowest is 2.5–3 LPA, and the highest package is around 10–12 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Cognizant, and similar MNCs.

admission_overview.college_name: SRM Ramapuram Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: SRM Ramapuram Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The university offers undergraduate and postgraduate levels courses in fields such as Engineering, Management, Architecture, and more. SRMJEEE (UG), SRMJEEE (PG) and SRMJEEM are the three entrance exams conducted by the university for shortlisting candidates for admission to certain courses of SRM Ramapuram. Other accepted entrance exams are JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. The final seat allotment is done through an e-Counselling process. Read the following article to learn all about the courses, admission criteria and procedure for SRM University Ramapuram.

SRM Ramapuram course admissionis based on eligibility criteria of the course. Candidates who want admission in undergraduate courses must pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board, while graduation is required for postgraduate courses. In addition to the basic eligibility, students are also required to clear the selection rounds. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for some of the popularSRM University courses:
Class 12 with 60% aggregate
SRMJEEE/JEE Main
UG degree with 60% aggregate
CAT/XAT/MAT/ATMA/NMAT/CMATor State-levelTANCET/SRMJEEM+GD/PI
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 60% in PCM
NATA| JEE Mains-Paper II
CompleteSRM Ramapuram admissionprocess by following below given steps:
Step 1: Application
Fill application form on the website and also submit required documents.
Step 2: Selection Criteria
Selection is based on merit in qualifying exam or in the entrance exam. The university has its own entrance exam, and it also accepts national-level tests, such as CAT/ XAT/ NATA, etc.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Pay the admission fees to secure your seat.

faqs.question: On what basis are SRM Ramapuram MBA seats allocated?

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, neat, and clean. There is no objection to joining the SRM campus.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine and good. Labs are useful for us. There is Wi-Fi. The hostel food is good, and they will clean daily. The canteen is also good. In case of any emergency, there is a hospital. There are a lot of games and tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but improve hostel food.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The hostel food is not good. It is very bad. Surrounding and campus will be very neat and clean. Students will have a good atmosphere to study. Infrastructure is getting improved day by day. They need to improve the hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: SRM Chennai for B. Tech (CSE).
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite huge, with a lot of places to chill and hang out with friends. There are many food stalls and joints to grab snacks or have lunch together. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are smart. The library has a good stack of all kinds of books. Hostel facility is provided. Many events take place throughout the year, be it hack fests or other co-curricular fests.

reviews.review_heading: I am able to communicate with our alumni seniors regarding companies required to hire.
reviews.review_text: Fully air-conditioned classrooms and the library are accessible to all at any working time. Wi-Fi is installed in each block. Labs are fully equipped, and brand new systems are installed. Hostels are fine and well maintained, and the warden and staff in the hostel are supportive.

reviews.review_heading: A solid start, but success isn’t handed to you.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at SRM RMP is reliable on campus. Admin and academic blocks are well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. Some rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with basic digital teaching aids. Hostels are generally clean, safe, and well-managed, but the food quality is average with limited variety. Sports facilities exist but are limited.

reviews.review_heading: Students may have some problems as the food is most of the time South Indian cuisine.
reviews.review_text: Well, the faculty members are mostly South Indians, so you must be fluent in English as are most of the students on campus. The labs are decent. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and also in hostels. The food is mid, and there is laundry available each week. The sports campus is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I will say that the college is very good for those who want to study and get jobs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is kind of okay. We have all facilities here, such as advanced labs like MLCP, where all the equipment are Apple devices and very high-speed Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are kind of average, just like normal classrooms, and there is no AC facility. Our college library has various books, but everything is online, so I rarely go there, as the library has an e-book feature available for those who stay far away from college. The hostel is really good, with excellent infrastructu...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for those who want to study and secure good jobs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not that bad. It is somewhere in between. We have MLCP labs that are equipped with Apple devices and high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms are kind of average, just like normal classes, with no AC and limited Wi-Fi. Our college library has various books, but since everything is online, I rarely go there. The library also has an e-book feature. The hostel and canteen are really nice and have proper facilities with great-quality food. The mess is okay. We have a sports ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied. Too crowded. No proper management. No planning of infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very poor. I would say it is the lowest all over India. There is no space, and all the buildings are cluttered close to each other. Every time during the start and end of classes, there is a crowd, and it is a very big one. It is the worst. Compared to the KTR campus, it is not even 2% in area of that. The area is very small and holds only 4-5 buildings, like the Ramapuram campus. There are always traffic jams in the morning. It is a very cramped valley way for a university. It...

reviews.review_heading: Good college but with high fees.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure:
The infrastructure is awesome, and I loved it when I joined this college. Whatever you want to do on the campus. There are plenty of research labs and facilities available. If students used that for the right purpose. Hostel fee is quite high compared to other colleges, but the facilities and food are so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for a student who wants to shine in life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not actually bad, it's average, that's it, because the students roam anywhere they want, so only the food is okay. Safety is one hundred per cent on my campus, so it's actually good and quite a well-maintained campus, and the hostels in SRM are good.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with excellent faculty, good placements, and strong infrastructure facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has excellent infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a fully functional library with a wide range of resources. High-speed Wi-Fi is available across the campus. Hostel rooms are clean and comfortable. Mess food is hygienic and provides a variety of dishes, though there is scope for improvement in taste. There are medical facilities, a gym, and sports grounds for cricket, football, and badminton. Overall, the campus provides a good environment for both study and...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and peer group. Placements just started for the 2026 batch.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi depends on your luck; some areas and labs have great networks, others not so much. The library isn't much of a library, but it has good computers for things like IEEE site access, which you will need later for paper publication. Classrooms are not bad; all are pretty neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: You can join SRM Ramapuram.
reviews.review_text: There is very good infrastructure that gives you a peaceful vibe every day. They have a good canteen and food. The canteen makes us feel a vibe. There is a sports complex which has sports facilities like football, cricket, basketball, and other games.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and it would have been better if we had basketball courts and football turf. The new building, which has been constructed, has new and well-conditioned ACs, and there are two lifts. The canteen is also properly maintained.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities due to its association with a hospital where a large number of patients are treated every day. The college hires its students as faculty members, and students are provided with a one-year rotating internship after completing their four-and-a-half-year undergraduate program. SDM prepares its students to thrive in any environment. Many students have achieved success on a global scale.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Around 100 students can be accommodated in each classroom. Classrooms are equipped with fans, lighting, projectors, and black and whiteboards. There is a library on campus. It has physical, digital books, and journals. It has over 10,000 books. The food served in the mess is good. They serve vegetarian food items. The institution places great importance on extracurricular activities. They have succeeded at local, district, national, and international levels. The campus has a canteen that offers Ayurvedic snacks and meals.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best to study Ayurveda.

review_content.Placements: Everyone gets internships in final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best. There is a vast library. Hostel is very good with a student-friendly atmosphere. Hostel provides a very good menu and food with a healthy diet but only vegetarian. Sports are encouraged regularly.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good at teaching but a little strict on restrictions. Facilities are very friendly. Students get the best practical knowledge as there is more patient exposure because of the good patient inflow.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best infrastructure and campus.

review_content.Placements: About placements: being a healthcare professional, people value you based on experience. As a fresher in Ayurveda, you need a lot of patience and perseverance for a placement. College does play a big role in getting an offer. Here in SDM, you get a lot of hands-on training in different aspects, which will help you get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and other infrastructure are of top-notch quality. A very beautiful college with spacious classrooms and a very vast library is there. A digital library facility is also available. Modern equipment is used to teach students. Smart-class facilities are there. Anatomy is something special to learn about the anatomy of a human body precisely. Hostel facilities are not so good but they are worth the fees.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of SDM College of Ayurveda and Hospital, Hassan.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities due to its association with a hospital where a large number of patients are treated every day. The college hires its students as faculty members, and students are provided with a one-year rotating internship after completing their four-and-a-half-year undergraduate program. SDM prepares its students to thrive in any environment. Many students have achieved success on a global scale.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Around 100 students can be accommodated in each classroom. Classrooms are equipped with fans, lighting, projectors, and black and whiteboards. There is a library on campus. It has physical, digital books, and journals. It has over 10,000 books. The food served in the mess is good. They serve vegetarian food items. The institution places great importance on extracurricular activities. They have succeeded at local, district, national, and international levels. The campus has a canteen that offers Ayurvedic snacks and meals.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best to study Ayurveda.

content.Placements: Everyone gets internships in final year.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best. There is a vast library. Hostel is very good with a student-friendly atmosphere. Hostel provides a very good menu and food with a healthy diet but only vegetarian. Sports are encouraged regularly.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good at teaching but a little strict on restrictions. Facilities are very friendly. Students get the best practical knowledge as there is more patient exposure because of the good patient inflow.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure and campus.

content.Placements: About placements: being a healthcare professional, people value you based on experience. As a fresher in Ayurveda, you need a lot of patience and perseverance for a placement. College does play a big role in getting an offer. Here in SDM, you get a lot of hands-on training in different aspects, which will help you get a job.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and other infrastructure are of top-notch quality. A very beautiful college with spacious classrooms and a very vast library is there. A digital library facility is also available. Modern equipment is used to teach students. Smart-class facilities are there. Anatomy is something special to learn about the anatomy of a human body precisely. Hostel facilities are not so good but they are worth the fees.

placements.overview: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Dental NIRF report 2024 has been released. The median package offered during BDS and MDS Amrita School of Dentistry placements 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 17 LPA, respectively. admission_process.title: Amrita School of Dentistry Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Dentistry admission 2025 isopen. The college offers admission to a full-time BDS programme at the UG level and MDS programme at the PG level. Admission to this course is completely entrance-based. Candidates are admitted based on a valid score ofNEET.The application process atAmrita School of Dentistryis conducted in online mode. Read on for more details around Amrita School of Dentistry admissions in the article below.

Amrita School of Dentistryadmissionto all the courses is based on NEET score. Additionally, to be eligible for admission, candidates are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted forAmrita School of Dentistry courses. Check below popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria related to Dentistry course admission 2025:
Amrita School of Dentistry course admissions 2025 for all courses are entirely entrance-based. Check below the complete Amrita School of Dentistry admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
For admission to any of the UG and PG courses at the college, the mode of application is online. Candidates are required to register online and then fill out the online application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
The college provides admission to all courses based on NEET UG and PG scores, followed by a counselling round.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Candidates are required to pay anAmrita School of Dentistry course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

admission_process.title: MNR University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MNR University admission 2025 is open for all courses. The university gives distinct courses at UG and PG levels. The university offers merit-based admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to BTech and BSc, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as TS EAMCET or any state-level entrance test or national-level entrance test.

Candidates looking for admission toMNR Universitycan apply on the official website of the university. To know more about MNR University admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

MNR University offers both entrance and merit-based admission to UG and PG courses. Candidates looking for university admission are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board, and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree.

Further, for BTech and BSc courses, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission. Check the below table forMNR University courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
- Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as mandatory subjects from a recognised board
- Candidates must have completed 16 years of age as on 31st December of the year of admission
- Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
- Candidates must be at least 17 years old as of December 31 of the admission year.
Merit-Based / Entrance-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 with Biology, Physics, and Chemistry.
Merit-Based
Graduation degree with 55% aggregate from a recognised board
Merit-Based

MNR University admission process 2025is ongoing on the official website of the university. The university accepts various entrance exam scores, such as TS EAMCET or any state-level or national-level entrance exam, for admission to BTech and BSc courses. Further, for admission to other UG and PG courses including BPT and MPT, the university offers merit-based admission. Check below for the step-by-stepMNR Universityadmission process:
Step 1: MNR University Application Process 2025

MNR University application is conducted on its official website. The eligible candidates are to apply online on the official website of the university. It is mandatory that the eligible candidates have completed the entrance exam formalities for BTech courses and must have qualified for the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the university.
Step 2: MNR University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech and BSc courses. The university accepts TS EAMCET and other state-level entrance tests or national-level entrance exams for admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses, the university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay theMNR University feeto confirm their admission.

The tuition fee of BTech is INR 1.5 lakh per semester. The fee is taken from the web actual values of fees may differ. Candidates who want admission to MNR University can visit the official website to register for admission.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MNR University admission?
faqs.answer: MNR University admissions are open for all courses. The college offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG and PG courses. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to full fill the criteria set by the university. After fill out the criteria, candidates seeking admission to MNR University must fill out the online application form by visiting the university official website.

faqs.question: Explain the step-by-step admission process of MNR University.
faqs.answer: MNR University admission 2025 carried out in online mode. The university offers various at UG and PG courses. The university offers both merit and entrance-based admission. Here is the step-by-step admissions process for the MNR University:Step 1: Application ProcessThe eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of MNR University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria.Step 2: Selection ProcessAdmission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.Step 3: Admission ConfirmationAfter candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MNR University?
faqs.answer: MNR University offers entrance-based admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses, such as BPT and MPT university offers merit-based admission. Applicants seeking admission to BTech and BSc must appear for entrance exams accepted by the university, Further, candidates are also required to complete the basic eligiblity i.e pass Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: When will the authority declare TS EAMCET result?
faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET result date is yet to be announced. JNTUH will release TS EAMCET result online on the official website. Candidates can check and download the TS EAMCET rank card. To download TS EAMCET rank card, candidates have to login with the registration number, TS EAMCET hall ticket number, and date of birth. In the rank card candidates will be able to check marks in each subject and rank. Based on the ranks of the candidates, seats will be allotted via the TS EAMCET online counselling will be held.

facilities: Classrooms: MNR University has spacious modern classrooms. The institute has adequate space in the classrooms for a comfortable sitting arrangement.
Laboratories: The institute has state-of-the-art of art facilities and equipment in all the laboratories.
Hostels: MNR University has separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostel's facilities include AC, telephones and internet, etc.

Sports and Recreation: The sports facilities of the university include adequate space for students interested in playing various sports. This is essential for an overall growth and development of students.
Other Facilities: Some of the additional facilities include 24-hour video surveillance at the university. There is a students' canteen, and MOUS with top MNCS and industry majors are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are good, but the infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is not much good, and labs are also not much good. However, the quality of the food served is good, and there are good medical facilities. Sports are also available, and the Wi-Fi facility is good. Classrooms are not bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Modern campus with great facilities, but faculty expertise and placement support needs improvement.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of students are placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Macleods, GSK, etc. B. Pharma got the top role in our college in pharmacy. The highest package was INR 5 LPA to & 5.7 LPA. An average package is 2.5 LPA, and the lowest package was 1.8 LPA. Around 90 percent of students got internships in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Dr. B. C. Roy College of Pharmacy offers modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a resourceful library. Hostels are spacious with good food and medical facilities. The campus also features sports infrastructure and promotes extracurricular activities for holistic development.

individual_reviews.title: Best college of pharmacy because of the qualified faculty, good placement, and the beautiful culture

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. Smart classrooms, specialized labs, and computer labs are good. Every floor has Wi-Fi, clean bathrooms, and purified drinking water supply. A common room is also available for games like carrom, table tennis for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for B.Pharma, and it provides good placements.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a very good college.

faqs.answer: K.G.Mittal Ayurvedic College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

individual_reviews.title: A Student's Perspective on the Campus Life and Curriculum.

content.Placements: After a 4 and 1/2 year course, everyone has to complete an internship in a government Ayurveda college for 6 months, 3 months in PHC, and 3 months in casualty of any civil and rural hospital. No company comes for placement in our college. After our degree, we joined hospitals and did PG.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is 1 building of 11 floors, out of which floors 6 to 10 are used for other purposes/not for academics. There is no hostel, garden, or gym. One canteen is there, and the quality is average. One big library is on the 5th floor, and the hospital is from the 1st to the 4th floor.

college_info.intro:
Acharya Nagarjuna University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. Guntur Nagarjuna University provides the best infrastructure facilities to students with the best state-of-the-art technology. ANU University has committed and dedicated faculty members with diversified and rich experience in research as well as teaching. This makes the learning experience in the classroom highly enriching and also influential. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Accenture, Axis Bank, TCS, and others.
Acharya Nagarjuna University MBA course is provided in three specialisations, namely Hospital Administration, Travel and Tourism Management, and International Business. MBA students are placed at the top Management positions. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of the MSc programme at ANU Guntur?
overview_faqs.answer: The total fee for the MSc programme at ANU Guntur ranges from INR 10,170 - INR 1.74 lakh. The exact fee depends on the specialisation of the MSc programme. Admission to the MSc programme is entrance based. overview_faqs.question: Will I get a fee refund if I cancel my MBA admission at ANU Guntur?
overview_faqs.answer: No, generally, a refund of the fee is not permitted on account of the withdrawal of admission once the admission is confirmed. However, a claim of refund may be processed after due consideration in the unfortunate event of the candidate not being able to continue the course. In such cases, the university refunds the fee. However, the fees paid for prospectuses, registration, and ID cards still remain nonrefundable under any circumstances. In case a foreign/NRI candidate withdraws the admission, then the refund is made as per the Foreign Exchange regulations, subject to the above-mentioned conditions.

overview_faqs.question: Is Acharya Nagarjuna University B.Ed valid in Odisha?
overview_faqs.answer: Acharya Nagarjuna University is approved by Univeristy Grant Commission (UGC) therefore, all the courses offered at ANU or its affiliated colleges are valid all over India, whether for further higher studies or for taking up a job.Candidates willing to take admission in B.Ed programme at Acharya Nagarjuna University must take the Andhra Pradesh EdCET exam to become eligible for the counselling process.

review_summary.college_name: Acharya Nagarjuna University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's fully satisfied and best faculty and we can live stress full life, the placements also good.

content.Placements: In this university, we can see most of the placements in Civil and Mechanical. The companies which come are mostly call centers and top IT companies, and the average package is around 4-10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure and food are very good and best for that cost. Wi-Fi is available in both classrooms and hostels. There is a big library where we can get a lot of materials, and the labs are very good and comfortable to do experiments.
content.Faculty: The schedule of the semester is very good, and simple, stress-free study is possible there. The examination fee should be online, and exams are conducted very strictly. The pass percentage is very good, and the papers are also very simple, not too difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Do not join this college, and the college is not good for students and faculty.

content.Placements: Every year, 30-40 percent of students are placed in campus placements. The highest package in Acharya Nagarjuna University is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The average package is 5 LPA, and the maximum company that visits my college is.
content.Infrastructure: Lab available but not explained properly in experiments in college, classrooms are okay, and the library is available in the department. The quality of facilities in the hostel is not available, and food in the worst situation in the mess, and canteen food is okay, medical amenities are okay, and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college provides a good academic environment with supportive faculty and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: The number of students who are placed in our college is high. Chalapathi gives you the opportunity, you just have to utilise it. Being placed totally depends on the skills that you acquired. The previous highest package offered in our college is 6.7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in our college are well maintained. The Wi-Fi facility, to be frank, I will rate it on average. The food prepared in our Mess for hostel students is hygienic and tastes good. If we talk about canteen food items would be rated as average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is budget-friendly.

content.Placements: A total of 856 students got placed in campus placements. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. The top recruiters of our college are TCS and Pal Tech. Overall, 50 percent of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus provides transport facilities for the day scholars, and the college has a central library. Classrooms are non-AC, and every department has its own labs that accommodate all the students of their course. The hostel environment is also good. The hostel will be on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A college without any fests and extra activities.

content.Placements: The college does not have any placements. Graduation-completed students from this college are still jobless. This college does not provide any proper skills to get a placement. First, the companies are not coming to the college the internship type jobs will come.
content.Infrastructure: There is a separate library for the department. A single library is present for all branches. The quality of food is better than that of other colleges. The Wi-Fi facility is available for both the college and the hostel. Limited sports facilities are available in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: Acharya Nagarjuna University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Entrance Exam & Dates

admission_process.title: Acharya Nagarjuna University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Acharya Nagarjuna Universityadmissionis based on the entrance mainly. The university offers various courses such as BA, BArch, MA, MCom etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university offers doctorate and advanced masters courses. The application can be completed online. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by theAcharya Nagarjuna University.You also need to participate in counselling through which seats will be offered.

For UG-level courses Class 12 with the relevant subjects and a valid percentage as specified by the university is the criteria. You can look at the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularAcharya Nagarjuna University courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry &Mathswith a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved categories)
ANUEET + Counselling
Class 12 in any stream with a minimum of 35% aggregate
Merit-Based
Class 12 in the Science stream with a minimum of 45% aggregate
AP EAMCET+ Counselling
UG degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate
AP ICET+ Counselling
BSc in relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate
AP PGCET+ Counselling
UG degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (40% for reserved categories)
AP EdCET+ Counselling
BA in relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate
AP PGCET+ Counselling

The total tuition fee for all the courses offered here ranges between INR 5,625 - INR 327,875. However, the overall fees that students end up paying to the college might be a little higher due to the inclusion of several other fee components

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many students leave a degree or a college. While the availability of student loans and financial aid has made education accessible but the requirements to become eligible for a loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Below are ANU University tuition fees along with average package details for popular courses:
Popular Courses
Average Package (INR)
The number of seats varies by course and can be changed by factors such as programme popularity and other reasons. Find below the ANU seats for different courses:
Popular Courses

The university accepts AP EAMCET and AP PGCET for admission to its courses. To get admission, you need to qualify for the entrance exams and complete the admission procedure. Find below the step-wise admission process ofAcharya Nagarjuna University:
ANU Application Process
To fill the application form candidates first have to register online for the entrance exam
Selection: Entrance exam/ Merit
Candidates have to appear for the course-specific entrance exam. The University also accepts national entrance exams for admission to its programme.
Counselling
Once the candidate's application form is approved, they are shortlisted. The shortlisted candidates are invited forcounselling.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BTech at Acharya Nagarjuna University?
faqs.answer: There is no provision for direct admission in the BTech course at Acharya Nagarjuna University (ANU). Acharya Nagarjuna University (ANU) offers BTech across various specialisations through Dr YSR ANU Engineering & Technology College.ANU inducts students in BTech through ANUEET, an entrance exam conducted by the Directorate of Admission, Acharya Nagarjuna University. Acharya Nagarjuna University inducts students based on the rank they obtained in ANUEET.

faqs.question: What are the important documents required for admission at Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: The list of documents required at the time of form filling at ANGRAU is given below:Entrance exam rank cardCopy of the Social Status certificate (for candidates belonging to OBC/ SC/ST)Copy of Class 12 marksheetsBachelor's degree certificate and marksheets (required for PG courses)Master's degree certificate and marksheets (required for PhD)Copy of Bonafide certificate

faqs.question: What is the ANUCET 2025 date for ANU Guntur MBA admissions?
faqs.answer: Acharya Nagarjuna University, Guntur, accepts ANUCET scores for admission to MBA and MCA courses. The ANUCET 2025 schedule is not available. Though, the 2024 exam schedule is available. Based on that, the university releases the application forms around the month of April and the exam is usually held in June.

highlights.description: Acharya Nagarjuna University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #84 in the University category, #67 under Pharmacy, and #24 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Acharya Nagarjuna University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
Acharya Nagarjuna University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 4 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 25 ranks to #84 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 4 ranks to #67 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 4 ranks to #24 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Acharya Nagarjuna University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Acharya Nagarjuna University's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 60 ranks to #761 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Acharya Nagarjuna University fell 13 ranks to #235 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel.description: The university has three hostels for boys namely Gowtham, Ashoka and Satavahana. The university also provides the hostel for research scholars named as Vasishta with accommodation of 100 students. The girls' hostel named as the Indira Priyadarshini Ladies Hostel.

library.description: The library has the collection of 1,44,246 books, theses, and government reports. The library has also the collection of 270 periodicals including Foreign and Indian both. Apart from this it also has various facilities like binding, Xerox, internet, and many more. The library has also the collection of over 250 journals both national & international.

reviews.review_heading: It's fully satisfied and best faculty and we can live stress full life, the placements also good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure and food are very good and best for that cost. Wi-Fi is available in both classrooms and hostels. There is a big library where we can get a lot of materials, and the labs are very good and comfortable to do experiments.

reviews.review_heading: Do not join this college, and the college is not good for students and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Lab available but not explained properly in experiments in college, classrooms are okay, and the library is available in the department. The quality of facilities in the hostel is not available, and food in the worst situation in the mess, and canteen food is okay, medical amenities are okay, and games are average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chalapathi Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 21 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college provides a good academic environment with supportive faculty and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms in our college are well maintained. The Wi-Fi facility, to be frank, I will rate it on average. The food prepared in our Mess for hostel students is hygienic and tastes good. If we talk about canteen food items would be rated as average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Our campus provides transport facilities for the day scholars, and the college has a central library. Classrooms are non-AC, and every department has its own labs that accommodate all the students of their course. The hostel environment is also good. The hostel will be on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bapatla Women's Engineering CollegeReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A college without any fests and extra activities.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate library for the department. A single library is present for all branches. The quality of food is better than that of other colleges. The Wi-Fi facility is available for both the college and the hostel. Limited sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 16 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are very good. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available. The library is good. The hostel is best and worth the money. There is a large area for playing games and other activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A college that is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Our campus provides transport facilities for the day scholars, and the college has a central library, classrooms are non-AC, and every department has its own labs that accommodate all the students of their course. The hostel environment is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bapatla Women's Engineering CollegeReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Better college with no placement.
reviews.review_text: There is no separate library for different branches. There is a single library for all branches. Not many books are available; only a few books are available in the library. The sports facilities are limited, but the quality of the food is better compared to other colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for exploring the tech field.
reviews.review_text: No doubt in the facilities section and hostel section. The college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi and labs with AC and also library as well as classrooms. The quality of the facilities given by the hostel is too good and worth the money and also the food is of good quality and nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My feedback for my worthy engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a pollution-free environment with greenery, and sports infrastructure is very good with a cricket ground, basketball court, and volleyball courts. The hostel is value for money, and the infrastructure is good. A study room will be available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good hostel (worth for money) and nice college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department. They provide labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. The library is also available. The hostel section is worth the money, and they provide many features along with quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available for our CSE AIML department. They provide labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and also a library. These facilities help people focus on their work. The hostel is truly worth the money.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course or department. It includes Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library. The library contains good books. Hostel is very nice with good food. It includes a proper diet and a clean environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nice college and explore the teaching field.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are very good. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms, as well as a library. The hostel facilities are also very good and worth the money, and the quality of food in the mess is excellent and worth the cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RVR and JC College of EngineeringReviewed on 8 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024-2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for the department is good, with the latest versions of systems. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, and classrooms also have the facility of digital teaching. The library has a huge collection of books, so we can get any book in the library. The hostel facilities are good, they provide quality food, and the mess is good and clean. There is a facility for playing indoor and outdoor games.

review_content.General: Every type of facility is available such as labs, classrooms, and a big and maintained library. I don't live in the hostel but I know about it from my friends, in hostel the room quality is good enough to stay and about food, it is quite decent, not bad and it's 3 times menu. A very big medical is also available on the college campus which is Padmini Care which is owned by DRIEMS University. And other facilities like sports lab, ground, and everything are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are average.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 40-50% of students got placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata Consultancy Services, ARC, Product IT, ESSPL, etc. 20-30% of students got internships in DRDO, Baleswar, etc. Some students are doing paid internships and some in startup companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, our faculty members are good. Our department is so beautiful and amazing. In our department, Wi-Fi is not available for students but ethernet will be provided in labs. Our library is awesome. Our hostel is good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, but the network is very slow. The food quality is normal. Sports facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Unveiling the Driems University Experience: Pros and Cons.

review_content.Placements: A maximum of 600 hundred-plus students enrolled in the course in Bachelor of Technology. The maximum package was 8 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Capgemini, TCS, Prodex, Tech Mahindra, Infotech, and Somya. The top roles offered are in full-stack web development and data analysis, with some including in frontend and Python development also.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped infrastructure and technology are available in every lab and classroom. They are well-designed, and every classroom has a projector or smart board. Faculty members are well-educated, and everyone is doing a Ph.D. A canteen is available behind the hostel, and the food is average.

faqs.answer: To secure admission at DRIEMS University BTech, candidates must have passed class 12 in Science stream with Maths as compulsory subject. The candidates are also required to appear for JEE Main/ OJEE and secure good rank for admission to DRIEMS BTech CS. The total seat intake of DRIEMS University BTech CS is 180.
faqs.question: Q: How do I get admission to DRIEMS University, Cuttack in the CS branch?

faqs.answer: The application process of DRIEMS University is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates willing to apply offline are required to visit the DRIEMS University campus and purchase the admission form from there. However, those who are willing to apply online can follow the steps mentioned below:Step 1: Visit the official website of DRIEMS UniversityStep 2: Click on the "Admission open 2024" banner reflecting on the home page.Step 3: Register using a valid phone number and email ID and click on submit.Step 4: Login using the credentials generated and fill out the DRIEMS Application form.Step 5: Upload relevant documents in the prescribed format and size.Step 6: Click on submit.
faqs.question: Q: How can I apply for DRIEMS University?

faqs.answer: DRIEMS offers more than fifteen courses with various sub-specialisations. The courses are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and doctoral levels. The admission criteria for DRIEMS University courses is either merit-based or entrance-based. This institute is known for its four-year, full-time flagship BTech programme that offers admission based on the performance of the candidate in JEE Main/ OJEE. Apart from BTech, also offers MTech, MBA, BSc, BPT, and more, courses.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses that DRIEMS University offers?

However, those who are willing to apply online can follow the steps mentioned below:Step 1: Visit the official website of DRIEMS UniversityStep 2: Click on the "Admission open 2024" banner reflecting on the home page.Step 3: Register using a valid phone number and email ID and click on submit.Step 4: Login using the credentials generated and fill out the DRIEMS Application form.Step 5: Upload relevant documents in the prescribed format and size.Step 6: Click on submit.
