review_summary.college_name: DRIEMS University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: As a current second-year student, I can speak about the overall placement reputation and what we hear from the senior batch. The placement cell is actively working, and the general sentiment is positive. The placement rate for the BBA graduation batch is typically around 60-70 percent. The highest package secured by a BBA graduate is 4 LPA. The average package generally falls between 3.0 and 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at DRIEMS is genuinely good and is one of the university's strong points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained. The BBA department has access to standard classrooms. The common computer labs are sufficient for our academic needs. The central library is well-stocked with essential management and commerce texts. It provides a quiet environment for studying. I appreciate, especially as I focus on maintaining a high CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty are good, but less competitive in study and academics.

content.Placements: Only the top 10% to 20% of students of the batch get jobs at average positions. The highest package offered is around 6 LPA-7 LPA for MBA and UG courses like BBA and BCA, it's not known. Top and continued recruiters in our college are some back and financial institutions. Internships you can get through college also you are on that level and up to the mark, you can also apply by yourself by improving your knowledge, presence, and skills.
content.Infrastructure: Every type of facility is available such as labs, classrooms, and a big and maintained library. I don't live in the hostel but I know about it from my friends, in hostel the room quality is good enough to stay and about food, it is quite decent, not bad and it's 3 times menu. A very big medical is also available on the college campus which is Padmini Care which is owned by DRIEMS University. And other facilities like sports lab, ground, and everything are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: In our college, teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are average.

content.Placements: In our college, 40-50% of students got placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata Consultancy Services, ARC, Product IT, ESSPL, etc. 20-30% of students got internships in DRDO, Baleswar, etc. Some students are doing paid internships and some in startup companies.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, our faculty members are good. Our department is so beautiful and amazing. In our department, Wi-Fi is not available for students but ethernet will be provided in labs. Our library is awesome. Our hostel is good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, but the network is very slow. The food quality is normal. Sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Unveiling the Driems University Experience: Pros and Cons.

content.Placements: A maximum of 600 hundred-plus students enrolled in the course in Bachelor of Technology. The maximum package was 8 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Capgemini, TCS, Prodex, Tech Mahindra, Infotech, and Somya. The top roles offered are in full-stack web development and data analysis, with some including in frontend and Python development also.
content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped infrastructure and technology are available in every lab and classroom. They are well-designed, and every classroom has a projector or smart board. Faculty members are well-educated, and everyone is doing a Ph.D. A canteen is available behind the hostel, and the food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in previous year batches.

content.Placements: Around 50-60% of students get placed every year in our college. The highest salary package offered in our college is around 8 LPA - 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA - 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our college are TCS, HP, Deloitte, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs are available for every class. A library is also available in our college. Different departments are available for every course. The hostel of the college is also good. The mess quality is good.

paragraphs: DRIEMS University admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 64 programmes at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels in various fields, including Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Nursing, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as JEE Main, GATE, and CAT, for admission to some specificDRIEMS University courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around DRIEMS University admission in the following article.
DRIEMS UniversityDuration: The college offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 18 months - 3 years.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in DRIEMS University?
faqs.answer: Admissions for various UG and PG courses at DRIEMS University in 2024 are based on either merit or entrance exams. If you want to apply for the flagship BTech courses, you can apply using your JEE Main/OJEE scores to get shortlisted for further rounds. Check below for the completeDRIEMS admission process:Application Process:To apply for DRIEMS University, you can either visit the official website and apply online or visit the university campus and purchase the application form from the admission office. Both online and offline modes are available.Selection Rounds:Once you have applied, you will need to appear for the relevant entrance exam as per the selection criteria of the chosen course. After that, you will need to wait for the release of the results.Admission Confirmation:If you are shortlisted based on your results, you will be called for document verification. You will then need to pay a course fee to confirm your seat in the university.

faqs.question: What are the courses that DRIEMS University offers?
faqs.answer: DRIEMS offers more than fifteen courses with various sub-specialisations. The courses are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and doctoral levels. The admission criteria for DRIEMS University courses is either merit-based or entrance-based. This institute is known for its four-year, full-time flagship BTech programme that offers admission based on the performance of the candidate in JEE Main/ OJEE. Apart from BTech, also offers MTech, MBA, BSc, BPT, and more, courses.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to DRIEMS University, Cuttack in the CS branch?
faqs.answer: To secure admission at DRIEMS University BTech, candidates must have passed class 12 in Science stream with Maths as compulsory subject. The candidates are also required to appear for JEE Main/ OJEE and secure good rank for admission to DRIEMS BTech CS.The total seat intake of DRIEMS University BTech CS is 180.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at DRIEMS is genuinely good and is one of the university's strong points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained. The BBA department has access to standard classrooms. The common computer labs are sufficient for our academic needs. The central library is well-stocked with essential management and commerce texts. It provides a quiet environment for studying. I appreciate, especially as I focus on maintaining a high CGPA.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are good, but less competitive in study and academics.
reviews.review_text: Every type of facility is available such as labs, classrooms, and a big and maintained library. I don't live in the hostel but I know about it from my friends, in hostel the room quality is good enough to stay and about food, it is quite decent, not bad and it's 3 times menu. A very big medical is also available on the college campus which is Padmini Care which is owned by DRIEMS University. And other facilities like sports lab, ground, and everything are available.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are average.
reviews.review_text: In our college, our faculty members are good. Our department is so beautiful and amazing. In our department, Wi-Fi is not available for students but ethernet will be provided in labs. Our library is awesome. Our hostel is good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, but the network is very slow. The food quality is normal. Sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Unveiling the Driems University Experience: Pros and Cons.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped infrastructure and technology are available in every lab and classroom. They are well-designed, and every classroom has a projector or smart board. Faculty members are well-educated, and everyone is doing a Ph.D. A canteen is available behind the hostel, and the food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in previous year batches.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs are available for every class. A library is also available in our college. Different departments are available for every course. The hostel of the college is also good. The mess quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied. Faculty members are very good and well-behaved and eco-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is better across the whole campus, also in classes. Labs are well-maintained and air-conditioned. We have library period every week, and on other free days, you can also go to the library, which helps in studying. In the hostel, the facilities are much better, and the food is also better.

reviews.review_heading: University with Good Surroundings, Good Faculty Members, and Good Facilities.
reviews.review_text: AC labs with all technical facilities such as Wi-Fi, highly performing systems with the latest technology. AC is not provided in the classrooms, but a sufficient number of fans and lights are there. Also, good quality desks and benches with smart class systems such as projectors, greenboards, whiteboards, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Satisfied with Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is very poor. There is only one lab for the entire department, with 30 computers, and many computers don't work properly. The classroom for us is the lab; there is no specific classroom for us. But the library is pretty good. I am not from the hostel, but from what I hear from the hostelers, the food is pretty bad.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good; no need to explain. You come here, and you will know everything.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course or department for Bachelor of Technology (BTech) students include computer labs with many computers. We have Wi-Fi in our hostel, and we have libraries, but they don't open for us, and if they do, they don't allow us access.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and green campus, well-structured and designed.
reviews.review_text: The environment is good, with a huge green campus that has a nature-friendly environment filled with gardens and plantations. The labs are well designed, but they could be upgraded because there isn't enough space for many students. The labs are fine and have working equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I have satisfied by the faculty's teaching experience. Good placement. Good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are 15 faculty members who teach us, and they have good coordination with the students. There are 4 labs: one hardware lab and three software labs. The quality of food in the hostel is very good, and all the students are satisfied with the food. The college conducts sports every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a decent college, but they should focus more on skill development.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 10 to 15 acres of land, with an eye-catching nature view and attractive buildings. The library and administrative building are must-visit places. The quality of hostel facilities is good, but the food is average. Aside from this, the medical, sports, and games facilities are top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: A very good environment to study and a very huge campus.
reviews.review_text: Classes are well maintained, but in class there is no Wi-Fi, but in the hostel Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day. The library has so many collections of books. In hostel canteens, food is averagely good. So many types of sports are available, and gyms and swimming pools are available in college.

reviews.review_heading: A Real Description of My College: Driems University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The campus is full of trees and buses. The classrooms are equipped with fans, lights, and benches. The hostel is also decent, with four people in one room and a common almirah for two people, along with a common bathroom.

reviews.review_heading: DRIEMS University:  An overview and review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good having a large area of the campus and building blocks of each department are separated. The classrooms are of various types such as smart classrooms and normal classrooms. For each department, specific practical labs are available in good conditions.

college_info.college_name: DRIEMS University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, DRIEMS University offers various scholarship schemes to meritorious students and those belonging to SC & ST, Minority, and Other Backward Class Welfare departments as per the Government of Odisha for the academic year 2024-2025. Students who wish to apply for these scholarships need to apply online through the ODISHA STATE SCHOLARSHIP PORTAL.

The eligibility criteria is specified below:a) Students shall belong to the ST/SC/OBC/SEBC/EBC community and should be permanent residents of Odisha.b) The students must be a regular student for the academic year 2024-2024.c) The annual family income of the parent/guardian from all sources in case of ST/SC students should not exceed INR. 2,50,000/- per annum.d) The annual family income of the parent/guardian from all sources in case of OBC/ SEBC students should not exceed INR.2,50,000/- per annum and they have to secure at least 50% marks in previous examinations.e) EBC category is applicable for Govt. Institute only.Note: Aadhar is made mandatory for availing scholarship. Students are required to provide the correct Aadhar number of self in the Online Application Form correctly.

table.details: Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology and Science
Rajiv Gandhi Prodyogiki Vishwavidyalaya and Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Indore (formerly)

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at SGSITS are BTech, MBA and MCA. SGSITS Indore offers BTech across various specialisations such as Bio-Medical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering, Information Technology, etc. The Institute extends these popular programmes with a duration of 2-4 years. The eligibility for the same is merit-based along with entrance exams such as JEE Main, CMAT, MPPET, GATE, GPAT etc.
While the MBA course is offered across specialisations, including Applied Physics & Optoelectronics, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics, Computer Engineering & Electrical Engineering, etc. The SGSITS Indore fee structure for BTech being around INR 4 Lakhs to INR 5.12 Lakhs depending on the specialisation while the SGSITS Indore MCA fees is around INR 1,25,550. Interested students can check the popular programmes offered at SGSITS Indore in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
The SGSITS Indore cutoff is out for admission to BTech and other courses through JEE Mains. The SGSITS cutoff for BTech in Computer Science and Engineering stood as the most competitive with the first and last round closing ranks being 21533 and 39483, respectively. While the most relaxed specialisation was BTech in Industrial and Production Engineering with 58539 and 152178 being the first and last round closing ranks, respectively.

Generally the SGSITS Indore cutoff varied between 39483 and 193204. Interested candidates can check the SGSITS JEE Main cutoff 2025 in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Govindram Seskaria Institute of Technology and Science (SGSITS Indore) extends more than 30 and Doctoral programmes across streams such as Engineering, Technology, Management, Medicine & Health Science, etc. These courses are offered in a range of specialisations allowing students to tailor their academic life to their preferences. SGSITS College Indore also features online courses by NPTEL that have been approved by the AICTE and are hosted by reputable institutes and universities in India.

faqs.answer: A:    SGSITS offers BTech and BTech Integrated courses based on JEE Main scores. Candidates having valid JEE Main ranks will be allowed to take part in JoSAA counselling rounds. Considering the SGSITS JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the Round 4 seat allotment results, the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at SGSITS consistently has the lowest cutoff among all branches. In the JEE Main 2025 Round 4 seat allotment results, the closing rank for the General AI category stood between 24908 and 69196. Likewise, B.Tech. in Industrial and Production Engineering has the highest cutoff among all programs. Check out the SGSITS CSE year-wise Round 4 closing ranks from the table below:Course2025B.Tech. in Civil Engineering55891B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering39680B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering46861B.Tech. in Information Technology31749B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering51823B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering44224B.Tech. in Industrial and Production Engineering67288B.Tech. in Bio Medical Engineering69196B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering24908
faqs.question: What is SGSITS cutoff for 2025?

faqs.answer: A:    The SGSITS accepts the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by a counselling round for admission to its BTech and BTech Integrated courses. As per Round 1 of the JEE Main 2025 cutoff, the closing rank for the General AI category candidates stood between is between 21533 and 58539. So, if a candidate wants to secure a seat at SGSITS, they should target securing a rank up to 58539 to improve their chances of getting a call from SGSITS for admission. faqs.answer: A:    Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

reviews_list.review_title: College is good, but students are not satisfied due to the increase in fees.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 85 percent students get placed other go for higher studies and some go for government exam preparation. The highest package is approximately 25 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA and the average package is 7 LPA. Top companies are Larsen and Turbo, L&T, Tata Projects, kalpataru etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.

review_content.Placements: Good for a state engineering college. Placement rates vary by branch and batch but are typically strong for CSE/IT and improving for core branches. IT services and product companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, some product firms and startups, regional manufacturing and engineering firms. In recent years, Tier-1 Indian product startups and mid-sized firms have participated. The average package is around 12 to 13 LPA for CS and IT, and the highest is 24 LPA by Goldman Sachs on campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.

review_content.Placements: For specifically CS, IT, and ECE, the placements here are pretty good, and for core branches like ME, CE, EE, and EI, they are not up to the mark, it was around an average of 5 LPA to 6 LPA. There are other branches like IPE and BME, particularly BME and IPE, where the average salary offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SGSITS Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider SGSITS Indore as a good institute?
overview_faqs.answer: SGSITS Indore is worth being considered as a good institute as it owns recognitions and accreditations of various national governing bodies. The Institute is recognised by UGC, AICTE and has several NBA accredited courses. Apart from this, SGSITS Indore has BTech as its flagship course which ranks under the rank-band of 201-300, withing the Engineering category of NIRF 2024. The Institute offers merit and means-based admission along with various scholarships to benefit from. Therefore, it can be concluded that SGSITS Indore is a good institute.

review_summary.college_name: SGSITS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 1st year of the SGSITS Indore Electrical Engineering branch. Approximately 60% of the total students were placed in core and technical sectors. The highest package was 19 LPA offered by ORACLE Inc. in a technical role. The average was 7.5 LPA. The lowest package was 3.5 LPA offered by TCS. The top recruiters include Havells, Oracle, Deloitte, and TCS. The top roles were in core and technical sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped with all the workout equipment, and the charges are 400 rupees per month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are supportive, and have a good placement record compared to others in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: Around 80% students' placement data of CSE, IT, ECE and around 50-60% for other branches. The highest package goes around 25 LPA, and the lowest around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Mastercard, Goldman Sachs, Oracle, etc. Almost all students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: You will get all basic facilities, including a library, all sports facilities, well-equipped classrooms and Wi-Fi facility with a computer lab. Medical facilities are also available, and hostel and mess food are average. If you do not want the college hostel, there are many PG flats available in nearby areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good, but students are not satisfied due to the increase in fees.

content.Placements: 80 to 85 percent students get placed other go for higher studies and some go for government exam preparation. The highest package is approximately 25 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA and the average package is 7 LPA. Top companies are Larsen and Turbo, L&T, Tata Projects, kalpataru etc.
content.Infrastructure: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.

content.Placements: Good for a state engineering college. Placement rates vary by branch and batch but are typically strong for CSE/IT and improving for core branches. IT services and product companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, some product firms and startups, regional manufacturing and engineering firms. In recent years, Tier-1 Indian product startups and mid-sized firms have participated. The average package is around 12 to 13 LPA for CS and IT, and the highest is 24 LPA by Goldman Sachs on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.

content.Placements: For specifically CS, IT, and ECE, the placements here are pretty good, and for core branches like ME, CE, EE, and EI, they are not up to the mark, it was around an average of 5 LPA to 6 LPA. There are other branches like IPE and BME, particularly BME and IPE, where the average salary offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

admission_process.title: SGSITS Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: SGSITS admissions 2026 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around SGSITS admissions 2026:
Application Process

SGSITS admission process starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at SGSITS. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG and UG courses at SGSITS is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main and CMAT for the selection of respective courses.
Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

SGSITS feesmay include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The university accepts various payment methods, including, credit card, debit card, net banking, and UPI. The table below mentions theSGSITS Feesfor various UG & PG courses:

faqs.question: What is the minimum qualification required to apply for SGSITS MBA in HA course?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the MBA in Hospital Administration at SGSITS, the aspiring candidates need a bachelor's degree in a relevant stream with at least 50% aggregate. Other than this, students must also have a valid CMAT score. Those who have fulfil these requirements can fill out the application form and participate in the counselling process to get an MBA seat.

courses_data.name: SGSITS MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: The SGSITS Indore offers specializations in Management of Business Studies and Hospital Administration, each with an intake of 60 students. Graduates with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved categories) in a recognized Bachelor's degree are eligible. The program ensures professional growth with a focus on industry-oriented management skills.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for MBA admission at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Candidates wishing to join MBA programs in SGSITS Indore have to possess a Bachelor's degree with at least three years duration and an aggregate score of 50% from an UGC/AICTE-approved Indian or foreign university recognised by AIU. If one belongs to SC/ST/OBC category of Madhya Pradesh they need 45% in graduation.

faqs.question: How many students can do MBA from SGSITS?
faqs.answer: As per official sources, SGSITS offers120 seatsfor the MBA programme. This implies that the institute admits 120 students to its MBA programme. Moreover, it is important to note that the aforementioned seat intake is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA course at SGSITS?
faqs.answer: TheSGSITS MBA fee structurecomprises multiple components to be paid by the students to pursue the course. As per the fee structure sourced from official sources, students are required to pay mainly three fee components: tuition fees, hostel fees, and a one-time fee. Check the below table to learn the total fees for MBA programme:Fee ComponentsAmountTuition FeesINR 80,000 - INR 1.5 lakhHostel FeesINR 1.12 Lacs - INR 1.45 lakhOne-time PaymentINR 1,500 - INR 6,700Total FeesINR 1.93 Lacs - INR 3.02

faqs.question: What is the minimum qualification required to apply for SGSITS MBA in HA course?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the MBA in Hospital Administration at SGSITS, the aspiring candidates need a bachelor's degree in a relevant stream with at least 50% aggregate. Other than this, students must also have a valid CMAT score. Those who have fulfil these requirements can fill out the application form and participate in the counselling process to get an MBA seat.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Shri GS Institute of Technology & Science Indore with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you would qualify for SGSITS Indore with Class 12th qualification from a recognised board since the minimum requirement to qualify is 45% aggregate in English, Physics, Chemistry/Biotechnology, and Mathematics. It also is based on entrance exam scores.

faqs.question: What is the cut off of SGSITS?
faqs.answer: The SGSITS accepts the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by a counselling round for admission to its BTech and BTech Integratedcourses. As per Round 1 of the JEE Main 2025 cutoff, the closing rank for the General AI category candidates stood between is between21533and58539. So, if a candidate wants to secure a seat at SGSITS, they should target securing a rank up to 58539 to improve their chances of getting a call from SGSITS for admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the SGSITS cutoff 2025 for General AI quota:JEE Main Round 1 Closing Rank (General-All India)Course2025B.Tech. in Civil Engineering54761B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering35170B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering41294B.Tech. in Information Technology26568B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering47041B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering39962B.Tech. in Industrial and Production Engineering58539B.Tech. in Bio Medical Engineering44024B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering215

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Shri GS Institute of Technology and Science Indore offers1500+ seats for courses such as BE/BTech, MBA, BPharma, MCA, ME/MTech etc. The Institute provides these NBA accredited UG and PG level courses infull-timemode with the fee structure ofINR 40 K- INR 3.80 Lakh. Apart from this, SGSITS Indore offers admission based onmeritandmeans.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Any accredited university or institute in any discipline awards a bachelor's degree.Minimum Points: 40% for SC/ST categories,  45% for OBC and general categories.Professional degrees: Fellow of the Institute of Actuaries, CS, ICWA, CA, and CS degrees are also acceptable.Entrance Exam: AICTE's CMAT is a required exam, and a score is required.Work Experience: Not required, but preferred.Group discussions and in-person interviews are part of the selection process (for shortlisted candidates).Resources: For the most recent information, consult the official SGSITS website or booklet.

notes: Note: This information is taken from official sources. It may change.

placement_data.title: SGSITS Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SGSITS placement cell has comprises departmental heads, faculty coordinators, skill development and placement officers. The training and placement cell works along-with the industry partners to offer better placement opportunities to its students.

According to SGSITS NIRF reports 2025, total of 420 students were placed and 98 students were selected for higher studies out of total 704 students during BTech placement 2024 . Further, BTech students received median package of INR 7 LPA in 2024. The median package offered during SGSITS placement 2024 for the MBA program stood at INR 3 LPA . A total of 17 students were placed out of 57 students.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

description: SGSITS cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the SGSITS JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

SGSITS JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the SGSITS CSE cutoff 2025 was 39483 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 89523, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the SGSITS B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 39483 and 193204 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 39483 and 48894, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the SGSITS B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Information Technology and B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 18410, 37589, and 48484, respectively.

In this section, students can know the cutoff for 2025, 2024 and 2023. As per the last round, the toughest course for admission was MCA with a rank of 39. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course was 276 and 263, respectively.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories, courses, rounds and years.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped ...

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and have a good placement record compared to others in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: You will get all basic facilities, including a library, all sports facilities, well-equipped classrooms and Wi-Fi facility with a computer lab. Medical facilities are also available, and hostel and mess food are average. If you do not want the college hostel, there are many PG flats available in nearby areas.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but students are not satisfied due to the increase in fees.
reviews.review_text: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

reviews.review_heading: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.
reviews.review_text: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: B. Pharma review at SGSITS Indore.
reviews.review_text: Labs are updated, and frequent industry visits take place, though limited in the first year. The library is the same for B. Tech and B. Pharma for all years' students. Hostel is run down, and food is horrible. Wi-Fi isn't available in hostels. There are lots of water problems in the hostel. Very limited medical facilities exist. There is a first aid shed outside the first-year boys’ hostel, which is only open for the first few hours of the day and remains closed the rest of the time.

reviews.review_heading: If you are from Madhya Pradesh, then definitely prioritize this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus size is small, but the college is located in the centre of the city, Indore, so everything is nearby. Don't expect quality faculty, the labs are a little too old, campus has only 1 cafe, canteen food is good, but hostel food is like 3/10. The hostel seats are very limited for boys.

reviews.review_heading: It has high fees with zero facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very bad because the hostels are very old. The hostel food at my college is very bad. Sports facilities are not much better. There is no Wi-Fi in hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics with growing placements.
reviews.review_text: The Civil Engineering department at SGSIT Sindhor is well-equipped with special classrooms, Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a rich library that supports both academic and projects. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular maintenance, and basic medical support. The mess and canteen provide average food. Sports grounds and indoor games encourage recreation and fitness. Overall, the infrastructure balances academic and study life efficiency.

reviews.review_heading: It is overall a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are good. I don't know about hostel facilities as my sister lives in a rented flat, but she said that the college is good, the campus is also good, and the labs are pretty good, so that you can learn something, whatever your course is.

reviews.review_heading: SGSITS has good faculty, average placements, large alumni network, very high fees and limited campus
reviews.review_text: The campus size of our college is just 35 acres. Considering the limitations of the area, the campus is built well. It has a cricket ground, a basketball court, a tennis court, and a sports complex. It has a computer lab, a central library, stationery, a gymnasium, a canteen, and a dining hall. Wi-Fi is not available in the whole campus its available in a few parts, like library & computer lab only. For newcomers, I have mentioned that the gym is there, but its of no use for most of you because ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent, you should take admission.
reviews.review_text: There are so many labs, classrooms, and a central library for study from morning to late night. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very neat and clean. The quality and taste of food is hygienic and acceptable. There is a playground for games and a sports complex for sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good for studying.
reviews.review_text: About 5-6 acres of land are covered for the college campus, and there are labs and classrooms separately for every department for study. There is a central library for study. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good. There is an RO water cooler for drinking purposes, a playground for outdoor games, and a sports complex for indoor games. The quality and taste of food in my mess are acceptable and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very relevant for placement purposes.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is a central library for study purposes, and there are many labs and classrooms in each department for their purpose. There is also a whole LAN and Wi-Fi connection. The quality of the hostel is very good, neat, and clean. The food in the mess and canteen is reliable to eat and hygienic. There is a dispensary for medical purposes as well.

reviews.review_heading: SGSITS is a good option for Madhya Pradesh college level counselling.
reviews.review_text: There are spacious classrooms for lectures and other academic purposes. Departmental labs for various disciplines, including civil, chemistry computer, electrical, electronics, mechanical, and physics. A central library with a vast collection of books, journals (print and online), and reference materials. There are four boys' hostels with a total capacity for 600 students. There are three girls' hostels with a capacity for 467 students. Wi-Fi is available, and security is ensured with 24/7 guard...

data.description: In Shri GS Institute of Technology and Science the food is not good. In the hostel, mess food is not good. In dinning hall which is also present in the college campus where you will get decent food but you have to pay extra for eating in dining hall.

college_info.college_name: SGSITS Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

The SGSITS MBA fee structure comprises multiple components to be paid by the students to pursue the course. As per the fee structure sourced from official sources, students are required to pay mainly three fee components: tuition fees, hostel fees, and a one-time fee. Check the below table to learn the total fees for MBA programme:
Fee Components
Amount
Tuition Fees
INR 80,000 - INR 1.5 lakh
Hostel Fees
INR 1.12 Lacs - INR 1.45 lakh
One-time Payment
Total Fees
INR 1.93 Lacs - INR 3.02 lakh
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

Yes, scholarships are available for undergraduate courses at Shri GS Institute of Technology & Science in Indore. Scholarship Programs are Merit Cum Means Scholarship, Central Sector Top Class Scholarship for SC Students, Post-metric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities, scholarships for physically handicapped and disabled students, Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students, National Talent Search Scheme Scholarship,  Life Science Foundation of India Scholarship, NTPC Scholarship scheme for Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe Students, etc.
These scholarships are offered by the government, you need to meet the specific eligibility criteria to get these scholarships.

Once the BPharma selection process at SGSITS's is over, students with a BPharma seat must pay the fees to secure their admission. As per official sources, the total tuition fee to be paid for the BPharma course is INR 2.68 lakh.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My brief review on Kurnool Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Award postings at the government hospital are implement for all the students from 2nd year thus the students gain sufficient clinical knowledge. The final year students once passed out are eligible for internship in the hospital and gain much more clinical knowledge about various treatment procedures and medications. Each student in internship gets around 30,000 rupees every month. Once the internship complete the students are asked to take the PG NEET exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: As it is a government college the infrastructure is okayish and needs to be improved. It will be good if some blocks are renovated. There are so many departments in the college such as anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, microbiology, pharmacology, forensic, community medicine and other clinical departments such as ophthalmic, ENT, surgery etc. All the departments are situated at different blocks respectively. Hostel: There are 2 hostels for boys and girls respectively. The hostel rooms are spacious with attached bathrooms and other required facilities. The infrastructure of hostel buildings is a bit better at girls hostels when compared to boys hostels. Food at the hostel is very good with a lot of varieties on menu everyday. The mess fee is approximately 5000 rupees every month. A lot of sports can be played such as basketball, cricket, badminton, table tennis etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: For locals, this college is good.

review_content.Placements: Around 40 percent of students were placed last year in MBBS, with the highest package of 15 Lacs and an average of 6 Lacs. Only top scorers or performers got placement in good medical institutions and hospitals. In the last year of the course, compulsory placement happens for all students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a huge library, medical rooms, mess, and canteen with cheap and hygienic food. There is a big infrastructure and ground. Sports facilities are good and average. The college is divided into many departments.

review_summary.college_name: Kurnool Medical College,Kurnool Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities and academic.

content.Placements: Placement percentage in our course was around 60-70%. The placement in our course was not very significant. Hospital organised separate exam for recruitment. Top package offered was 40 LPA. Average package was around 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Narayana Health, Apollo, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Labs were well maintained and arranged with all the required equipment. Library was available on the college campus. Hostel quality was good. Limited sports facility was present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it offers the best package for MBBS.

content.Placements: Most students who seek admission take the MBBS course. Most of my friends who are in contact are earning well, and I am earning almost 15 LPA while working in a government hospital in West Bengal. Role offered is like a doctor. It’s a course, so there are no internships or placements, but most of students are doing well and learning effectively.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities for our course are fantastic. There is 24X7 Wi-Fi provided, along with a water filter and coffee machines for students. Hostel facilities are also good. There are two students in each hostel room, and charges are minimal. The quality of canteen food is good, and we also get three meals in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Really good facilities and academic.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Labs were well maintained and arranged with all the required equipment. Library was available on the college campus. Hostel quality was good. Limited sports facility was present.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it offers the best package for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities for our course are fantastic. There is 24X7 Wi-Fi provided, along with a water filter and coffee machines for students. Hostel facilities are also good. There are two students in each hostel room, and charges are minimal. The quality of canteen food is good, and we also get three meals in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: My brief review on Kurnool Medical College.
reviews.review_text:
As it is a government college the infrastructure is okayish and needs to be improved. It will be good if some blocks are renovated. There are so many departments in the college such as anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, microbiology, pharmacology, forensic, community medicine and other clinical departments such as ophthalmic, ENT, surgery etc. All the departments are situated at different blocks respectively.
Hostel:
There are 2 hostels for boys and girls respectively. The hostel room...

reviews.review_heading: For locals, this college is good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a huge library, medical rooms, mess, and canteen with cheap and hygienic food. There is a big infrastructure and ground. Sports facilities are good and average. The college is divided into many departments.

reviews.review_heading: Kurnool Medical College has developed very well and has better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very helpful to gain subjects very easily. We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, projectors, etc. All these things are very helpful to understand the subject knowledge very easily. Labs are also very helpful and we understand the concept they teach us .

reviews.review_heading: Kurnool medical college in Andhra Pradesh for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is of very good quality, but the products provided are only of medium quality. Many facilities are provided, such as fast Wi-Fi, labs, bathrooms, hostels, and drinking water machines, but additional charges are included in our fees. The college canteen food is very tasty and neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Experiences of UG in a medical college.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel,  more wifi boxes are there; even in our mess, there is wifi. To study, libraries and reading rooms are present. Mess food is very tasty and healthy to eat. On the hostel grounds, cricket, shuttle and basketball courts are present.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good teachers, a good environment for study purposes, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somewhat good in my college. Wi-Fi is available, and the labs and classrooms are equipped with projectors and CCTV cameras. The college has 19 departments with highly experienced faculty, and the postgraduates are helpful during training. The class environment is very good. The hostel facilities are also good, with Wi-Fi and a nice mess. There are courts and nets for cricket, and the hostel has a good environment for studying. The hostel expenses are 5,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best State government college in AP to study MBBS. It’s very old and needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Basic facilities are provided by the government as it is a government medical college. There are good and well-equipped labs in each department. There is a college ground for the students. The classrooms are spacious and do have the capacity to accommodate 250 students. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of Kurnool medical college .
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided by the college, and the infrastructure is good. Different labs are present in the respective departments and have free access to all laboratory studies. The college library is a pool of all the best books and has all the accessibility and requirements. The facilities and technological provisions are very good. Every year, a sports tournament is conducted in which all the students participate and enjoy themselves together. The food in the hostel is very good, and a...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good having good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is old but not too bad. Mess and hostel facilities are okay. Sports and games sector is developing. The classrooms have Wi-Fi availability and PPTs are on point. Virtual studying has developed more in the past years. The hostel food is fresh and rooms are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college and I am very happy with it.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are nice in our college. The food facilities are also okay. We receive excellent quality of food here in our hostel and the mess manager is very cooperative. I am very happy with the mess and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges in our state.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi is provided on the campus. Labs are provided, classrooms are big. Hostel facilities are good. They provide food, electricity, Wi-Fi, rooms, etc. Medical facilities are available in a medical cell or room. Sports and cultural events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are not bad and the college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. The lab facilities are good. The college is cleaned every day and frequently. The students get to handle some cases (patients). Treatments will be given to the patients by the students under the faculty’s guidance. All types of equipments required are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kurnool Medical College, Kurnool.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good; all facilities are provided. The B.Ed rooms ensure that every student has separate beds with attached bathrooms. The food is good, and a canteen is also available on the campus. The classrooms are neat, and the labs are well-equipped with enabled Wi-Fi.

review_content.Placements: About 61% of the students from our batch got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Doctor and surgeon are the roles offered in our course. The popular programs at GIMS Noida include the MBBS course, that is provided to students who wish to make their careers as Medical Professionals. The MBBS program, as well as PG courses like MD, DNB, MSc Nursing, etc., provide students with the right set of skillsets for a solid Medical foundation. The courses at GIMS are offered across several specializations.
These specializations are offered by various departments at the institute. These departments include Anatomy, Microbiology, Pediatrics, General Medicine, Obstetrics/Gynecology, Pulmonary Medicine, Medical Incubator, among others.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Greater Noida.

review_content.Placements: In an MBBS course, there is no placement guarantee as such. What we do get is a fixed internship for 1 year after our course gets over. During our internship, we have to work at our hospital in different departments as there is a clinical rotation. We get to learn a lot of our practical skills during this internship. The stipend during an internship is the same across all the medical colleges in UP.

We have access to a basketball court, a volleyball court and an indoor stadium for badminton and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is not really worth spending that much amount on, its hostel has many restrictions.

content.Placements: The 1st batch of CON will pass out this year, and there are no placements provided by the institute for the students. No companies visit. Internships are given, which are unpaid and in their own hospital. This year, it will be decided what offers they can provide to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is the worst thing about this college. The staff of the mess are not fair and tend to judge girls. They also don’t maintain the hygiene of the food. The drinking water is not safe to drink; the water appears yellow in color. The hostel is the worst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is not a good place to spend that much money, its hostel is full of restrictions.

content.Placements: There is one batch which is passed. There is no placement for passing students. They don't even provide a stipend to the interns or the nursing students. There is one batch which is passed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well-developed. The hostel of the college is also developed and has facilities with Wi-Fi, etc. The food quality is average. They maintain all the hygiene during the preparation of food. They also have their wet canteen at an affordable price.
content.Faculty: The faculty members of the institute are well educated, they all have PhDs and Masters holders from different universities. The college follows the Indian National Council syllabus. The exam is conducted by AVBMU University in different centres, which are allotted by the university itself.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Greater Noida.

content.Placements: In an MBBS course, there is no placement guarantee as such. What we do get is a fixed internship for 1 year after our course gets over. During our internship, we have to work at our hospital in different departments as there is a clinical rotation. We get to learn a lot of our practical skills during this internship. The stipend during an internship is the same across all the medical colleges in UP.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are very well equipped, with new instruments available for us to use. Our labs are also in association with ICMR. The infrastructure of our hospital, college and hostel is impeccable, with the hospital building being fully air-conditioned. Hostels are available as a 2-seater option. We have access to a basketball court, a volleyball court and an indoor stadium for badminton and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely a very good college, and I recommend it.

content.Placements: There are no issues with placements. In MBBS, everyone eventually gets a job. A medical graduate can work in any hospital and get a minimum package of 6 lacs per annum, which can practically go up to 12 lacs per annum. This profession has no limits in terms of packages.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, GIMS college is fully functional in the building of Gautam Buddha University, but a separate building for GIMS academics has been proposed and is expected to be built soon. Till now, one person gets a single room in the hostel, but this may change soon. Sports facilities are excellent, and I can bet that no other medical college in UP has such sports facilities.

faqs.question: Is GIMS Noida hard to get?
faqs.answer: Students seeking admissions into GIMS must apply for the institute online. The admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. The common Medical tests that are held for admissions at Government Institute of Medical Sciences include the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), and the UP NEET. faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Government Institute of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: GIMS Noida conducts its admissions via the entrance test method. The institute accepts prominent Medical exams like NEET and UP NEET for its admissions. Students can visit the official website of GIMS to learn more about the specific course-specialization eligibility of their choice. Students can appear for the NEET exam and after the counselling round, obtain a seat at GIMS.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBBS at GIMS?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) course is the flagship UG programme at GIMS. Students can visit the official website of GIMS and learn more about the specific specialization-wise eligibility criteria. The admissions are held for UG students on the basis of the NEET examination. The NEET exam is conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA), and admissions are held on the basis of cutoffs.

faqs.question: How to reach GIMS Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: GIMS is located in the new urbanized hub of Greater Noida. For students arriving at the Indira Gandhi International (IGI) Airport, it would take around 1 hour to reach GIMS campus. The work on the nearby Jewar Airport is also proceeding smoothly. For students arriving at the New Delhi Railway Station, it would take about the same amount of time of an hour to reach Government Institute of Medical Sciences.

description: Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12255 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna MBBS cutoff 2025 was 12255 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17538 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The 3rd round of seat allotment for Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD, MS, UG Diploma programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 6743 to 36982, with MS in Orthopaedics being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD, MS, and UG Diploma courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Anaesthesiology, with a round 3 closing rank of 20903 for the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for different categories, quotas and rounds.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Institute of Medical Sciences, Kasna cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 7774 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 12796 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sree Gokulam Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our college conducts the best classes. They provide good exposure to clinical affairs, inter equipment, and accessories. All students who have passed the 4th year got placed in the hospital to complete house surgency, with a salary of around Rs. 6,000 per month, which is low compared to government medical colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-furnished classrooms. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They provide separate technical assistants for technical support. Our college has a good canteen and a stationery shop. It provides separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels are good. Our college provides facilities for sports like a football ground, basketball court, and a shuttle court.

review_content.Placements: We have the best in class and good exposure to students in clinical affairs and international equipment and accessories. review_content.Infrastructure: There are well-equipped hospital facilities, a lecture hall, canteen, laboratories, and the hostel is also good. The library is large and well-equipped. The hostel is neat and tidy with Wi-Fi facilities, and the food is of good quality. The lecture hall is big and has smart class features.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 1 year of internship is necessary for course completion. The stipend is very low as compared to other colleges. Current stipend is 7000/month. It's a great opportunity to work under different departments and gain hands-on experience and improve our clinical skills. After internship, we can apply for a job as JR, and the expected salary is 4.8 - 9.6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. It is situated over a vast area of 50 acres with good patient loads and facilities. OP facilities and 24/7 casualty with free Wi-Fi, diagnostic labs, pharmacy, operation theatre, blood bank, and radiodiagnostic department are available in the hospital block. The academic block contains labs, a lecture hall, an auditorium, and a library. A canteen is also there. Separate Men's and Ladies' hostels are there. A and B blocks with 5 floors have larger rooms than C and D blocks. C block has 10 floors. Lift facilities are available. A swimming pool and gym are also there near the hostel. AC will also be provided if needed. The quality of food is average.

review_summary.college_name: Guntur Medical College, Guntur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Prestigious college and proud to be a student of this college.

content.Placements: Our 2k24 batch contains 250 members and all seats are filled. The students who studied in our college reached greater positions after their internship. The passed-out batches are working in top hospitals around the world. Our college offers MBBS and paramedical courses. Each course has its own value, and all of them have good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure, and each classroom has AC. As labs are important to each student, we can get all information about the subject from those labs, and faculty will make us do all the experiments. Faculty members clarify all our doubts and teach everything clearly so that everyone can understand the chapters. Faculty members are available at all times in their respective departments. The hostel has Wi-Fi facilities, washing machines, and geysers available. The mess food is eatable, and the canteen also has affordable prices. Regarding sports and games, the 1999 batch students recently provided a good playground in the hostel for volleyball and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent clinical and patient exposure.

content.Placements: Well, we all know, that MBBS is a 5.5-year course, out of which 4.5 years would be academics and 1 year would be internship at the hospital affiliated with the college. Guntur Medical College students have to do an internship in the government hospital GGH for a year. During the 4.5 years of an academic course, students won't be earning at all. However, there are government and private scholarships available for eligible students. During the internship, students will be paid a decent amount of stipend which is around Rs. 20, 000 per month. However, it varies from state to state (Rs. 7, 000 to Rs. 40, 000).

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied, Great faculty, and nice garden.

content.Placements: After qualifying entrance NEET 250 members will be entered into the college as a batch. Where roll numbers will given according the first letters of their full name. After finishing MBBS there will be one year internship where students work at local hospital GGH, government general hospital. Another entrance exam should be attempted to qualify for PG.
content.Infrastructure: Since the college was built in 1946 that it is before independence, infrastructure is not upto the mark. Although classrooms and labs are being renovated. All the labs and lecture halls are available, spacious and are maintained well. GMC also has library where all the books, magazines, articles are available. It also has a very large auditorium for events and fests. Classrooms have AC and projectors.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement percentage of our college is 100%. Almost 100% of students got internships from our college. It is a good college. The average salary package offered ranges between 15 LPA - 20 LPA. The highest salary package may be in crores per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7. The food served in the mess is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel has good security and is clean. It is a prestigious college. They gave many good doctors not only in India but in foreign countries. Our college has a well-established library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: It's a wonderful college for MBBS. Not only in studies but also in other activities like research. You can explore various opportunities. And the hospital is very good for clinical practice, as the patient flow was very high. I would recommend this college for MBBS aspirants.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is average. But when compared to other colleges, it is good. Water facilities are good. Mess is okay. A canteen is available in both the college and hostel. 10 minutes is the distance between the college and the hostel. Easy ways of transportation are available. Medical facilities are very good, even at midnight.
