reviews.review_heading: Excellent clinical and patient exposure.
reviews.review_text: Guntur Medical College is the 2nd oldest medical college in the state. It is established around 76 years ago. It would be more like a museum or any monument rather than a fancy architectural building like most of the other private medical colleges. Basic facilities, like classrooms and library, are decently maintained. Ventilation and other facilities of the classroom depend on the department of the particular subject. Other necessary facilities, like mess, canteen, etc., are average. Out of all...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, Great faculty, and nice garden.
reviews.review_text: Since the college was built in 1946 that it is before independence, infrastructure is not upto the mark. Although classrooms and labs are being renovated. All the labs and lecture halls are available, spacious and are maintained well. GMC also has library where all the books, magazines, articles are available. It also has a very large auditorium for events and fests. Classrooms have AC and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7. The food served in the mess is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel has good security and is clean. It is a prestigious college. They gave many good doctors not only in India but in foreign countries. Our college has a well-established library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average. But when compared to other colleges, it is good. Water facilities are good. Mess is okay. A canteen is available in both the college and hostel. 10 minutes is the distance between the college and the hostel. Easy ways of transportation are available. reviews.review_heading: Review of Guntur Medical College, Guntur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. It is a very old college. Our college is built with stones. Classrooms are old. A few classrooms have good boards. They will be upgraded slowly. Our college has the biggest hospital in Andhra Pradesh.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our professors, facilities, and equipment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good equipment. The hostel rooms are good. The food served in the mess is good. The reading room is air-conditioned. The playground is huge. Our college provides facilities for sports like cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a hostel, faculty members, infrastructure, mess, and sports that are good.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have public Wi-Fi. Classrooms are authentic and digital. The hostel is very old. The building was constructed around the 1960s. The hostel is not up to the mark. If you can survive in a hostel, you can survive anywhere. A new block is sanctioned. It may take two and a half years to construct according to plan. In the college, there is a private canteen. The canteen food is average. Sports are played. There is a cricket ground, a volleyball court, and a badminton court. Medic...

reviews.review_heading: This is a prestigious college.
reviews.review_text: It is a very old building to look at but the interior of our college is excellent. The students have air-conditioner classrooms, an an air-conditioner library, and a huge auditorium. It also has a very large seating capacity capable of 800-1000, and parents are allowed to watch. The hostel facility is good, and it also has a big ground at the the hostel. Our laboratories are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great government college to pursue your MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. The classrooms are air-conditioned. A huge central library is available with subscriptions to renowned medical journals and all the standard textbooks. It has air-conditioned reading rooms. Food facilities and accommodation facilities are good. The largest pathology museum in Asia is present in GMC Guntur.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The library is good for studying, and most of the students study at the library. A good collection of books is available in the library. Classrooms are good and big with a seating capacity of 150-200 students. It would be audible from anywhere in the class.

reviews.review_heading: It has good staff and campus with good infrastructure, hostel, essential labs, and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and it has almost all the facilities. Food served is fine and the environment is calm which is needed to study. There is good security. Bus facility is also available and we have a playground. A medical kit is available and study rooms are provided with air conditioners. We have a good library with all the required books to know the recent advancements, which is great.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in the center of city.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is about 20 minutes from college, and the college infrastructure is good with a good garden in the center. The college is old with good infrastructure. Games like cricket and volley are encouraged, and the library is one of the largest in terms of other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally satisfied with the college. MBBS from Guntur Medical College is like a dream come true.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good here. In Guntur Medical College, there is the biggest pathology museum in Asia. The infrastructure is great. This college was established before independence, but it is still highly maintained with a lush green campus and air-conditioned smart classrooms. Hostel facilities and food facilities are good. The ladies' hostel is really good. Men's hostel is in the process of renovation, and within a year, it will become great. Wi-Fi facilities are available in hostels. Our college...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and great for AIQ students.
reviews.review_text: It is an old college with a great ambiance. The classrooms are well-equipped, but sports are not good. The library is good. Hospital is great for learning with a green campus. The staff is helpful. Professors are great, and the teaching language is English. The student company is good, and around 250 students are there.

college_info.college_name: Vishwakarma University: Admission 2026, Courses, Fees, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary:
Vishwakarma University admissions 2026 are currently open for various courses. Interested candidates can apply online through the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: BA, BDes, BSc, BPharm, BCom, BBA, BTech, MDes, MBA
VUNET, JEE Main, MHT-CET, CAT, CMAT, CLAT, NATA, CEED, UCEED
IBM, SAP, TCS, Jio, Capgemini, HDFC Bank, etc.

college_info.intro:
Vishwakarma University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers an MBA programme across specialisations such as Finance, HR, Marketing and Operations. At VU, the MBA programme blends theoretical knowledge with practical experiences, which enhances the learning process.
The university currently offers 23 UG Programmes, 18 PG Programmes, and 2 Diploma Certificate programmes in the disciplines of Arts, Design, Architecture, Engineering, Pharmacy, Management Studies, Law, Analytics, Liberal Arts, Media, Journalism, Music, and Travel Tourism. Other popular courses include BA, BSc, BBA, LLB, LLM, MSc, etc. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Vishwakarma University and their respective eligibility and Vishwakarma University fees:

placements.overview: Admission at Vishwakarma University is on the basis of entrance exams. Appearing for VUNET is mandatory for admission at Vishwakarma University for certain (Engineering/ Management/ Design/ Law) Undergraduate and Postgraduate courses listed by the University. For courses, for which VUNET is not valid such as DPharma, admissions are on the basis of merit. Additionally, candidates seeking provisional admission can approach the VU Counselling and Admissions Office (Pune) directly. Find below the documents required during form filling:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has the top infrastructure in Pune and guaranteed internships. Job placements depend on skills.

review_content.Placements: Internships are guaranteed, with many getting placed at TCS and some at Wipro. Jobs depend on skills and not CGPA. Teachers help deserving students secure great opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: We cannot complain about the infrastructure at all especially labs. The college boasts top-tier infrastructure, better than 90% of Pune colleges. There is a friendly environment. There are about 5 canteens and a food lane called a hotspot. The food can be a lot better but there are cold drinks. There is a variety of food and also expensive snacks. I bought a mojito for Rs. 100.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent campus life and industry-focused curriculum at VU.

review_content.Placements: The percentage placement of VU, Pune is excellent. The highest package reaches 51 LPA, with average packages being 9 LPA-10 LPA. Top recruiters are Microsoft, Oracle, IBM, TCS, Barclays, and Deloitte. The highest stipend for the internship in CSE is 3-7 Lakhs/month. Popular roles include software engineering, data analyst, consultant, and product specials. Mechanical, IT, ETC, and chemical have the best placements. It has good placement with companies like Mercedes Bens, Accenture, and Wipro.
review_content.Infrastructure: VU, Pune has good infrastructure and Wi-Fi enabled campus, well-equipped labs, good classrooms, and library with vast academic resources. Hostels provide modern amenities with separate accommodation for boys and girls, though opinions on mess food vary on quality. Medical facilities include on-campus medical rooms with doctors. Sports and recreation are encouraged with facilities for various games and modern gymnasium.

review_summary.college_name: Vishwakarma University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The worst college I have seen.

content.Placements: Our college has no good placements. There are not many companies like other colleges. The companies that are coming are not giving too much package. This companies give only 3 LPA to 4 LPA packages. The highest package is 15 LPA, and the average is not known to us.
content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't have any hostel and because of this, we have to take a private hostel which is far from college. The area is also not good but college has AC. All facilities are there for students, and the college campus is small and there is much crowd.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, friends, teachers, and seniors.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in college. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA and the minimum is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are JP Morgan, Amazon, and Flipkart. More than 50% of students get placements based on skills in our course. B.Tech CSE is top course.
content.Infrastructure: My college has a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Our library has all the books that are required for engineering and our library staff is supportive. I am living in the flat and my canteen is good to eat. There is a basketball ground with sports games like cricket and tennis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has the top infrastructure in Pune and guaranteed internships. Job placements depend on skills.

content.Placements: Internships are guaranteed, with many getting placed at TCS and some at Wipro. Jobs depend on skills and not CGPA. Teachers help deserving students secure great opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: We cannot complain about the infrastructure at all especially labs. The college boasts top-tier infrastructure, better than 90% of Pune colleges. There is a friendly environment. There are about 5 canteens and a food lane called a hotspot. The food can be a lot better but there are cold drinks. There is a variety of food and also expensive snacks. I bought a mojito for Rs. 100.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent campus life and industry-focused curriculum at VU.

content.Placements: The percentage placement of VU, Pune is excellent. The highest package reaches 51 LPA, with average packages being 9 LPA-10 LPA. Top recruiters are Microsoft, Oracle, IBM, TCS, Barclays, and Deloitte. The highest stipend for the internship in CSE is 3-7 Lakhs/month. Popular roles include software engineering, data analyst, consultant, and product specials. Mechanical, IT, ETC, and chemical have the best placements. It has good placement with companies like Mercedes Bens, Accenture, and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: VU, Pune has good infrastructure and Wi-Fi enabled campus, well-equipped labs, good classrooms, and library with vast academic resources. Hostels provide modern amenities with separate accommodation for boys and girls, though opinions on mess food vary on quality. Medical facilities include on-campus medical rooms with doctors. Sports and recreation are encouraged with facilities for various games and modern gymnasium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Vishwakarma: A disaster.

content.Placements: Students are given admission regardless of any percentage criteria. It's just that you have to give any one of the exams, like JEE, CET, or the college entrance exam, and regardless of the score, they give you admission. The highest is 10-13 Lacs and the lowest is around 3-4 Lacs. Placements of VU happen with VIT, and the only requirement is a good (around 9) CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is great for the girls' hostel. The mess is nice, hygienic, and overall it's great in terms of the hostel, but the infrastructure for the course is not even average. Everything is under construction, even the playgrounds. Although they have made Wi-Fi, labs, and a library available, in terms of rating, it's really very average. Not good.

admission_overview.title: Vishwakarma University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Vishwakarma University admission 2025 is open for various courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc. The selection criteria are a mix of entrance exams. To get admitted to VU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process at Vishwakarma University is conducted online. Read the article to know more about Vishwakarma University course admission 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: Vishwakarma University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Vishwakarma University (VU) Pune admission is primarily entrance-based. Candidates looking for admission can visit their official website vunet.vupune.ac.in to register themselves for the Vishwakarma University National Entrance Test (VUNET). Appearing for VUNET is mandatory for admission at Vishwakarma University for certain (Engineering /Management/ Design/ Law/ Pharmacy) UG and PG courses listed by the University. For courses for which VUNET is not valid, admissions are based on merit. Additionally, candidates seeking provisional admission can approach the VU Counselling and Admissions Office (Pune) directly. Check the VU, Pune eligibility and selection criteria for admission to various VU courses: Course

admission_process.title: Vishwakarma University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission process is a multi-step process. Starting with the application, go through the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Selected candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission.

In addition, Admission to VU courses is based on merit and entrance exams. Candidates can check the detailed admission process below:1: Vishwakarma University Application ProcessStudents interested in getting into VU must submit the online application form for all UG and PG courses at https://admission.vupune.ac.in/ as per their preferred course. Vishwakarma University's application process is conducted both online and offline.2: Vishwakarma University Selection Criteria & Release of Merit ListAfter the applications are submitted, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists are released on the Vishwakarma University official website.3: Admission Confirmation at Vishwakarma UniversityPost the selection rounds, candidates who are shortlisted and have their names on the merit lists can submit thefeeand confirm their admission to the respective course at Vishwakarma University.

faqs.question: Can I get into Vishwakarma University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission criteria to Vishwakarma University is merit based and is different for all UG and PG programmes. To get into UG programmes, the eligibility criteria is the minimum aggregate in Class 12 or equivalent, along with entrance exams for a few courses. However, the eligibility criteria to get into PG programmes is graduation in any discipline (this may differ from course to course), along with entrance exams.

faqs.question: How are BPharma placements at Vishwakarma University?
faqs.answer: The placements are good at Vishwakarma University for BPharma courses. The highest package offered during Vishwakarma University placements 2023 stood at INR 35 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Vishwakarma University in recent years include Wipro, HDFC Bank, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Axis Bank, Cognizant, Amazon, Deloitte, Hewlett Packard, ITC, TATA Motors, Siemens, Asian Paints, Capgemini, City Bank, and Bosch Ltd., among others.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee to pursue BA at Vishwakarma University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee to pursue a BA at Vishwakarma University is INR 36,000 to inr 6 lakh. This shows the variation of tuition fees charged by the university for different BA specialisations. This is as per verified sources. It can still vary.

faqs.question: How much is the tuition fee to pursue BSc (H) at Vishwakarma University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee to complete the Vishwakarma University BSc (H) programme ranges from INR 3.2 Lacs to INR 5.4 lakh . This fee is to be paid annually. Moreover, students must note that the aforementioned fees is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change. Hence, it is indicative.

highlights.description: Vishwakarma University is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #13 by the Times 2025 under the BBA category, and #67 under Management Institutes. It ranked #454 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Vishwakarma University rankings have been explained in the article below:

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among Times Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2024

qs_world.description:
Taking into consideration the overall score, Vishwakarma University has been placed in a good position by the QS World University Rankings 2023 under the 'Asia' category. By the provided parameters such as Faculty Quality Weightage and Employability Weightage, the college is ranked well when compared with other universities It has been noted that in the 'Asia' category the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2023, Vishwakarma University fell 50 ranks to #651 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Top Global Universities' category as compared to the QS World University Rankings of preceding years. In 2024, Vishwakarma University fell 300 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. reviews.review_heading: The worst college I have seen.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have any hostel and because of this, we have to take a private hostel which is far from college. The area is also not good but college has AC. All facilities are there for students, and the college campus is small and there is much crowd.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, friends, teachers, and seniors.
reviews.review_text: My college has a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Our library has all the books that are required for engineering and our library staff is supportive. I am living in the flat and my canteen is good to eat. There is a basketball ground with sports games like cricket and tennis.

reviews.review_heading: It has the top infrastructure in Pune and guaranteed internships. Job placements depend on skills.
reviews.review_text: We cannot complain about the infrastructure at all especially labs. The college boasts top-tier infrastructure, better than 90% of Pune colleges. There is a friendly environment. There are about 5 canteens and a food lane called a hotspot. The food can be a lot better but there are cold drinks. There is a variety of food and also expensive snacks. I bought a mojito for Rs. 100.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus life and industry-focused curriculum at VU.
reviews.review_text: VU, Pune has good infrastructure and Wi-Fi enabled campus, well-equipped labs, good classrooms, and library with vast academic resources. Hostels provide modern amenities with separate accommodation for boys and girls, though opinions on mess food vary on quality. Medical facilities include on-campus medical rooms with doctors. Sports and recreation are encouraged with facilities for various games and modern gymnasium.

reviews.review_heading: Vishwakarma: A disaster.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is great for the girls' hostel. The mess is nice, hygienic, and overall it's great in terms of the hostel, but the infrastructure for the course is not even average. Everything is under construction, even the playgrounds. Although they have made Wi-Fi, labs, and a library available, in terms of rating, it's really very average. Not good.

reviews.review_heading: Not that much satisfied with this university.
reviews.review_text: So, according to me, the infrastructure of our college is not good, meaning it's not developed properly. Hence, they are working on it, but it might take some years to get built properly. The Wi-Fi availability is proper, the labs are good, the classrooms are not proper, and the library is also good. The hostel of the university is so bad, meaning no Wi-Fi and the mess is the worst. How can someone manage to eat that food?

reviews.review_heading: College is fantastic and gives best experience.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are amazing. The food quality of the hostel is amazing, and the medical facility is good. They have lots of sports activities, and the clubs and curriculum activities give students on-ground experience.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing teachers and really good infrastructures.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very kind and eager to teach us. They make sure we learn something new every day and encourage us to explore new concepts. The classrooms are tidy and clean. In the design department, they have a library, workshops, a photography room, an art and design room, and computer labs. Both the hostels and the college provide high-speed Wi-Fi. The food is great in the hostel, and we have laundry days so we don't have to wash clothes by hand. The canteen in VU is really affordable for ...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for students at the Vishwakarma University.
reviews.review_text: Vishwakarma University has a well-maintained and developed infrastructure for the M.Sc. course. All kinds of necessary facilities are available for students. Library and Wi-Fi facilities are available for students on the college campus. Hostel facilities are also available for students. Sports and other necessary facilities are provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: College have great infrastructure but very poor placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, parking, canteens, AC classrooms, etc. Huge buildings, great infrastructure, clean toilets. Food quality in the hostel depends on the canteen. There are 3 main canteens in VU. Overall, quality is good but not great. Sports are there.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the management and faculty of Vishwakarma University.
reviews.review_text:
Vishwakarma University is having a lively campus. Facilities available on the campus of the college are good. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, WiFi, libraries, canteens, etc., for the students. Infrastructure for computer science is also good. 
Sports facilities are also given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishwakarma University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty much simple and you can also use the wifi of the college on campus. The library is a bit smaller, as it has only 26-28k books, which is again a minus point but soon there will be more options to explore. The canteen is really good and a bit hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Best of Vishwakarma University
reviews.review_text: All the departments have good ventilated classrooms with enough lighting. Some departments also have air-conditioned classrooms. They have smart boards and blackboards. There are many labs and even Wi-Fi. They have huge libraries and also many reading rooms and study rooms for self-study. The hostel has good and hygienic food. The environment is also hygienic and clean, with good stay services. Canteens and mess are provided, including medical facilities and grounds for sports.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. [Hons] Computer Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7 in the college. Labs are well cleaned and well maintained, with all the lab accessories working. Classrooms are also well maintained and cleaned, and the library provides good facilities along with nice behavior from the faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Vishwakarma university, whetherel to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not on par for a private college. B.Teach course doesn't have much of a campus life the buildings are old and under construction, also they don't give priority to infrastructure more than the placements. So don't opt this college for campus life.
